message:
test(bd-1w9n): cover remaining event_store.rs branches

Add 8 tests for EventEntry Debug/Clone, expiry checks,
EventStoreConfig/Stats Debug/Clone, EventStore Debug,
cleanup_expired noop with no TTL, clear_stream noop for
nonexistent stream, and event ID format validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
